moves_today: Run the GitHub Action to generate your first brief and populate this dashboard with live data.
Set your GROQ_API_KEY, GMAIL_USER, GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD, and SEND_TO secrets in GitHub → Settings → Secrets.
Trigger manually via Actions → Rebel Talent Daily BD Intel Brief → Run workflow.
top_3: Dashboard is live — data populates automatically every weekday at 7am ET after secrets are configured.
The PDF brief is emailed to your subscriber list each morning with full synthesis.
Subscribe button on this dashboard routes to Google Sheet via Apps Script webhook.
hiring_signals: Hiring signal data will appear here after first run.
exec_moves: Executive move data will appear here after first run.
vehicles: FPP (Fractional People Practitioners) — primary warm distribution channel for Series A–C founders.
GoFractional marketplace — active lead source for inbound fractional talent requests.
competitive: Competitive landscape data will appear here after first run.
